$comment: Shared TS config. Every app/service/lib/package has its own tsconfig that extends this one — single source of truth (no config drift). The `paths` block below is what gives @nx/enforce-module-boundaries its teeth: without it Nx can't resolve @ringtail/* (apps & services have no `exports`/`main`) and silently SKIPS the tag depConstraints. Values MUST start with `./` (relative to this file) — a bare `libs/...` triggers TS5090 since there's no baseUrl. Paths are added per-package as they land (empty until the first workspace package exists).
